message:
fix(tests): align installer E2E tests with actual BackupStore and UpdateOptions API

Fixes compilation errors in installer_e2e.rs:
- BackupStore::create takes 2 args (path, version), not 3
- BackupInventory.backups field, not .snapshots
- BackupStore::rollback arg order is (install_path, backup_id)
- UpdateOptions: no system/channel fields; install_dir is PathBuf not Option
- Add metadata_cache_file/ttl/refresh_cache/offline_bundle_manifest fields
- Remove unused AiTool import
- Rewrite bootstrap inject test to use public API only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -497,10 +497,10 @@ pub fn run_update_sequence(opts: &UpdateOptions) -> UpdateReport {
 
         TargetMetadata {
             target_tag,
-            artifact_url: bundle_archive_path
-                .as_ref()
-                .map(|path| path.display().to_string())
-                .unwrap_or_else(|| String::from("<bundle-archive>")),
+            artifact_url: bundle_archive_path.as_ref().map_or_else(
+                || String::from("<bundle-archive>"),
+                |path| path.display().to_string(),
+            ),
             source: TargetMetadataSource::OfflineBundle,
             bundle_archive_path,
             bundle_checksum_path,
